name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: Delete
description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetBoundingBox
description: Gets two points of a box enclosing the specified object.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the minimum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MinPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the maximum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MaxPoint

name: GetExtensionDictionary
description: Gets the extension dictionary associated with an object.
return_value: The extension dictionary for the object.

name: GetInvisibleEdge
description: Gets the visibility setting for an edge of a 3DFace object at a given index.

parameters.description: The index of the edge to query. The index must be between 0 and 3 inclusive.
parameters.name: Index

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.description: True: The object is highlighted. False: The existing highlight is removed from the object.
parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Mirror
description: Creates a mirror-image copy of a planar object around an axis.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point2

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Mirror3D
description: Creates a mirror image of the given object about a plane.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the third point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point3

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Move
description: Moves an object along a vector.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point2

name: Rotate
description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the point through which the axis of rotation is defined as parallel to the Z axis of the UCS.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object. This angle determines how far an object rotates around the base point relative to its current location.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates an object around a 3D axis. Point1 and Point2 define the line that becomes the axis of rotation.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The factor by which to scale the object. The dimensions of the object are multiplied by the scale factor. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 reduces the object. The scale factor must be greater than 0.0.
parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetInvisibleEdge
description: Sets the visibility state of an edge at a given index.

parameters.description: An index specifying the edge to set. The index must be between 0 and 3 inclusive.
parameters.name: Index

parameters.description: True: Sets the edge to invisible. False: Sets the edge to visible.
parameters.name: State

name: SetXData
description: Sets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: TransformBy
description: Moves, scales, or rotates an object given a 4x4 transformation matrix.

parameters.description: A 4x4 matrix specifying the transformation to perform.
parameters.name: TransformationMatrix

name: Update
description: Updates the object to the drawing screen.

name: Application
description: Gets the Application object.
property_value: The Application object that is the owner of the object.

name: Coordinate
description: Specifies the coordinate of a single vertex in the object.
property_value: All other objects: The variant has three elements, representing the X and Y coordinates in WCS; the Z coordinate will default to 0 on the active UCS.

name: Coordinates
description: Specifies the coordinates for each vertex in the object.
property_value: All other objects: The variant is an array of 3D points in WCS.

name: Document
description: Gets the document (drawing) in which the object belongs.
property_value: The document (drawing) that contains the object.

name: EntityTransparency
description: Specifies the transparency value for the entity.
property_value: Use one of the following values:

name: Handle
description: Gets the handle of an object.
property_value: The handle of the entity.

name: HasExtensionDictionary
description: Determines whether the object has an extension dictionary associated with it.
property_value: Boolean

name: Hyperlinks
description: Gets the Hyperlinks collection for an entity.
property_value: The Hyperlinks collection for the entity.

name: Layer
description: Specifies the layer for an object.
property_value: The name of the layer.

name: Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of an object.
property_value: The linetype of an object. The default linetype is the linetype of the layer (ByLayer).

name: LinetypeScale
description: Specifies the linetype scale of an object.
property_value: This value must be a positive real number. The default is 1.0.

name: Lineweight
description: Specifies the lineweight of an individual object or the default lineweight for the drawing.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: Material
description: Specifies the name of the material.
property_value: The name of the material.

name: ObjectID
description: Gets the object ID.
property_value: The object ID of an object.

name: ObjectName
description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.
property_value: The AutoCAD class name of an object.

name: OwnerID
description: Gets the object ID of the owner (parent) object.
property_value: The object ID of an object's owner.

name: PlotStyleName
description: Specifies the plot style name for an object, group of objects, or layer.
property_value: The plot style name for the object.

name: TrueColor
description: Specifies the True Color of an object.
property_value: The True Color object of the object.

name: VisibilityEdge1
description: Specifies the visibility of a 3DFace edge 1.
property_value: Boolean

name: VisibilityEdge2
description: Specifies the visibility of a 3DFace edge 2.
property_value: Boolean

name: VisibilityEdge3
description: Specifies the visibility of a 3DFace edge 3.
property_value: Boolean

name: VisibilityEdge4
description: Specifies the visibility of a 3DFace edge 4.
property_value: Boolean

name: Visible
description: Specifies the visibility of an object or the application.
property_value: Boolean

name: AppendVertex
description: Appends a vertex to the end of a 3DPolyline, Polyline, or PolygonMesh object.

parameters.description: The coordinates specifying the vertex to be appended. PolygonMesh: An array of 3D WCS coordinates specifying the appended row of vertices. 3DPolyline: An array of 3D WCS coordinates specifying the vertex to append. Polyline: An array of 3D coordinates. The X and Y coordinates are given in OCS, the Z coordinate is ignored.
parameters.name: Point

name: Boolean
description: Performs a Boolean operation (union, intersect, or subtract) between the object and another 3DSolid or Region object.

name: Layer
description: Specifies the layer for an object.
property_value: The name of the layer.

name: Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of an object.
property_value: The linetype of an object. The default linetype is the linetype of the layer (ByLayer).

name: LinetypeScale
description: Specifies the linetype scale of an object.
property_value: This value must be a positive real number. The default is 1.0.

name: Lineweight
description: Specifies the lineweight of an individual object or the default lineweight for the drawing.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: Material
description: Specifies the name of the material.
property_value: The name of the material.

name: MomentOfInertia
description: Gets the moment of inertia for the solid.
property_value: A 2D or 3D coordinate based on the current coordinate system.

name: ObjectID
description: Gets the object ID.
property_value: The object ID of an object.

name: ObjectName
description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.
property_value: The AutoCAD class name of an object.

name: OwnerID
description: Gets the object ID of the owner (parent) object.
property_value: The object ID of an object's owner.

name: PlotStyleName
description: Specifies the plot style name for an object, group of objects, or layer.
property_value: The plot style name for the object.

name: Position
description: Specifies the X, Y, Z coordinate for center of the base or center of the solid, or the origin for the position marker, helix, or underlay.
property_value: The X, Y, Z coordinate for the base, center, or origin of the object.

name: PrincipalDirections
description: Gets the principal directions of the solid or region.
property_value: The X, Y, and Z coordinates calculated on the current coordinate system.

name: PrincipalMoments
description: Gets the principal moments property of the solid or region.
property_value: The X, Y, and Z coordinates calculated on the current coordinate system.

name: ProductOfInertia
description: Gets the product of inertia of the solid or region.
property_value: The X, Y, and Z coordinates calculated on the current coordinate system.

name: RadiiOfGyration
description: Gets the radius of gyration of the solid or region.
property_value: The X, Y, and Z coordinates calculated on the current coordinate system.

name: ShowHistory
description: Specifies whether to show history of the solid.
property_value: Boolean

name: SolidType
description: Indicates the type of solid.
property_value: The type of solid.

name: TrueColor
description: Specifies the True Color of an object.
property_value: The True Color object of the object.

name: Visible
description: Specifies the visibility of an object or the application.
property_value: Boolean

name: Volume
description: Gets the volume of the solid.
property_value: The volume of the solid.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.description: True: The object is highlighted. False: The existing highlight is removed from the object.
parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Move
description: Moves an object along a vector.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point2

name: Offset
description: Creates a new object at a specified offset distance from an existing object.

parameters.description: The distance to offset the object. The offset can be a positive or negative number, but it cannot equal zero. If the offset is negative, this is interpreted as being an offset to make a "smaller" curve (that is, for an arc it would offset to a radius that is "Distance less" than the starting curve's radius). If "smaller" has no meaning, then it would offset in the direction of smaller X, Y, and Z WCS coordinates.
parameters.name: Distance

return_value: An array of the newly created objects resulting from the offset.

name: Rotate
description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the point through which the axis of rotation is defined as parallel to the Z axis of the UCS.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object. This angle determines how far an object rotates around the base point relative to its current location.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates an object around a 3D axis. Point1 and Point2 define the line that becomes the axis of rotation.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The factor by which to scale the object. The dimensions of the object are multiplied by the scale factor. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 reduces the object. The scale factor must be greater than 0.0.
parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetXData
description: Sets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Offset
description: Creates a new object at a specified offset distance from an existing object.

parameters.description: The distance to offset the object. The offset can be a positive or negative number, but it cannot equal zero. If the offset is negative, this is interpreted as being an offset to make a "smaller" curve (that is, for an arc it would offset to a radius that is "Distance less" than the starting curve's radius). If "smaller" has no meaning, then it would offset in the direction of smaller X, Y, and Z WCS coordinates.
parameters.name: Distance

return_value: An array of the newly created objects resulting from the offset.

property_value: acDimVerticalJustification enum

name: Visible
description: Specifies the visibility of an object or the application.
property_value: Boolean

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: Delete
description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetBoundingBox
description: Gets two points of a box enclosing the specified object.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the minimum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MinPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the maximum point of the object's bounding box.

name: GetExtensionDictionary
description: Gets the extension dictionary associated with an object.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Mirror

parameters.name: Point2

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

parameters.name: RotationAngle

parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The factor by which to scale the object. The dimensions of the object are multiplied by the scale factor. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 reduces the object. The scale factor must be greater than 0.0.
parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetXData
description: Sets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: Delete
description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetBoundingBox
description: Gets two points of a box enclosing the specified object.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the minimum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MinPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the maximum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MaxPoint

name: GetExtensionDictionary
description: Gets the extension dictionary associated with an object.
return_value: The extension dictionary for the object.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.description: True: The object is highlighted. False: The existing highlight is removed from the object.
parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Mirror
description: Creates a mirror-image copy of a planar object around an axis.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point2

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Mirror3D
description: Creates a mirror image of the given object about a plane.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the third point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point3

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Move
description: Moves an object along a vector.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point2

name: Rotate
description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the point through which the axis of rotation is defined as parallel to the Z axis of the UCS.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object. This angle determines how far an object rotates around the base point relative to its current location.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates an object around a 3D axis. Point1 and Point2 define the line that becomes the axis of rotation.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The factor by which to scale the object. The dimensions of the object are multiplied by the scale factor. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 reduces the object. The scale factor must be greater than 0.0.
parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetXData

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: Delete
description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetBoundingBox
description: Gets two points of a box enclosing the specified object.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the minimum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MinPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the maximum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MaxPoint

name: GetExtensionDictionary
description: Gets the extension dictionary associated with an object.
return_value: The extension dictionary for the object.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.description: True: The object is highlighted. False: The existing highlight is removed from the object.
parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Mirror
description: Creates a mirror-image copy of a planar object around an axis.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point2

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Mirror3D
description: Creates a mirror image of the given object about a plane.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the third point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point3

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Move
description: Moves an object along a vector.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point2

name: Rotate
description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the point through which the axis of rotation is defined as parallel to the Z axis of the UCS.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object. This angle determines how far an object rotates around the base point relative to its current location.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates an object around a 3D axis. Point1 and Point2 define the line that becomes the axis of rotation.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The factor by which to scale the object. The dimensions of the object are multiplied by the scale factor. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 reduces the object. The scale factor must be greater than 0.0.
parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetXData
description: Sets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: TransformBy
description: Moves, scales, or rotates an object given a 4x4 transformation matrix.

parameters.description: A 4x4 matrix specifying the transformation to perform.
parameters.name: TransformationMatrix

name: Update
description: Updates the object to the drawing screen.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: Delete
description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetBoundingBox
description: Gets two points of a box enclosing the specified object.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the minimum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MinPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the maximum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MaxPoint

name: GetExtensionDictionary
description: Gets the extension dictionary associated with an object.
return_value: The extension dictionary for the object.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.description: True: The object is highlighted. False: The existing highlight is removed from the object.
parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Mirror
description: Creates a mirror-image copy of a planar object around an axis.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point2

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

description: Creates a mirror image of the given object about a plane.

name: Rotate
description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the point through which the axis of rotation is defined as parallel to the Z axis of the UCS.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.

parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetXData
description: Sets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

property_value: The Application object that is the owner of the object.

name: Arrowhead1Block
description: Specifies the block to use as the custom arrowhead for the first end of the dimension line.
property_value: The name of the block to use as the arrowhead for the first end of the dimension line.

name: Arrowhead1Type
description: Specifies the type of arrowhead for the first end of the dimension line.
property_value: acDimArrowheadType enum

name: Arrowhead2Block
description: Specifies the block to use as the custom arrowhead for the second end of the dimension line.
property_value: The name of the block to use as the arrowhead for the first end of the dimension line.

name: Arrowhead2Type
description: Specifies the type of arrowhead for the second end of the dimension line.
property_value: acDimArrowheadType enum

name: ArrowheadSize
description: Specifies the size of dimension line arrowheads, leader and mleader line arrowheads, and hook lines.
property_value: The size of the arrowhead must be specified as a positive real >= 0.0.

name: DecimalSeparator
description: Specifies the character to be used as the decimal separator in decimal dimension and tolerance values.
property_value: A single character used as the separator in decimal values.

name: DimConstrDesc
description: Specifies a description for the constraint.
property_value: The description for the constraint.

name: DimConstrExpression
description: Specifies the expression or value of the constraint.
property_value: The expression or value of the constraint.

name: DimConstrForm
description: Specifies the type of constraint.
property_value: Boolean

name: DimConstrName
description: Specifies a name for the constraint.
property_value: The name for the constraint.

name: DimConstrReference
description: Specifies the parameter is a reference constraint.
property_value: Boolean

name: DimConstrValue
description: Specifies the value of the constraint.
property_value: The value of the constraint.

name: DimensionLineColor
description: Specifies the color of the dimension line for a dimension, leader, or tolerance object.
property_value: Use a color index number from 0 to 256, or one of the constants listed here:

name: DimensionLineExtend
description: Specifies the distance the dimension line extends beyond the extension line when oblique strokes are drawn instead of arrowheads.
property_value: A positive real number specifying the distance to extend the dimension line beyond the extension line.

name: DimensionLinetype
description: Specifies the linetype of the dimension line.
property_value: The name of the linetype assigned to the dimension line.

name: DimensionLineWeight
description: Specifies the lineweight for the dimension lines.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: DimLine1Suppress
description: Specifies the suppression of the first dimension line.
property_value: Boolean

name: DimLine2Suppress
description: Specifies the suppression of the second dimension line.
property_value: Boolean

name: DimLineInside
description: Specifies the display of dimension lines inside the extension lines only.
property_value: Boolean

name: DimTxtDirection
description: Specifies the direction of the dimension text.
property_value: Boolean

name: Document
description: Gets the document (drawing) in which the object belongs.
property_value: The document (drawing) that contains the object.

name: EntityTransparency
description: Specifies the transparency value for the entity.
property_value: Use one of the following values:

name: ExtensionLineColor
description: Specifies the color for dimension extension lines.
property_value: Use a color index number from 0 to 256, or one of the constants listed here:

name: ExtensionLineExtend
description: Specifies the distance the extension line extends beyond the dimension line.
property_value: A positive real number specifying the distance to extend the extension line beyond the dimension line.

name: ExtensionLineOffset
description: Specifies the distance the extension lines are offset from the origin points.
property_value: A positive real number specifying the distance to offset the extension line beyond the origin points.

name: ExtensionLineWeight
description: Specifies the lineweight for the extension lines.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: ExtLine1Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of the first extension line.
property_value: The linetype of the first extension line.

name: ExtLine1Suppress
description: Specifies the suppression of the first extension line.
property_value: Boolean

name: ExtLine2Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of the second extension line.
property_value: The linetype of the second extension line.

name: ExtLine2Suppress
description: Specifies the suppression of the second extension line.
property_value: Boolean

name: ExtLineFixedLen
description: Set extension line fixed length.
property_value: The fixed length of the extension line.

name: ExtLineFixedLenSuppress
description: Sets suppression of extension line fixed length On or Off.
property_value: Boolean

name: Fit
description: Specifies the placement of text and arrowheads inside or outside extension lines, based on the available space between the extension lines.
property_value: acDimFit enum

name: ForceLineInside
description: Specifies whether a dimension line is drawn between the extension lines even when the text is placed outside the extension lines.
property_value: Boolean

name: FractionFormat
description: Specifies the format of fractional values in dimensions and tolerances.
property_value: acDimFractionType enum

name: Handle
description: Gets the handle of an object.
property_value: The handle of the entity.

name: HasExtensionDictionary
description: Determines whether the object has an extension dictionary associated with it.
property_value: Boolean

name: HorizontalTextPosition
description: Specifies the horizontal justification for dimension text.
property_value: acDimHorizontalJustification enum

name: Hyperlinks
description: Gets the Hyperlinks collection for an entity.
property_value: The Hyperlinks collection for the entity.

name: Layer
description: Specifies the layer for an object.
property_value: The name of the layer.

name: LinearScaleFactor
description: Specifies a global scale factor for linear dimensioning measurements.
property_value: A real number greater than 0.0.

name: Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of an object.
property_value: The linetype of an object. The default linetype is the linetype of the layer (ByLayer).

name: LinetypeScale
description: Specifies the linetype scale of an object.
property_value: This value must be a positive real number. The default is 1.0.

name: Lineweight
description: Specifies the lineweight of an individual object or the default lineweight for the drawing.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: Material
description: Specifies the name of the material.
property_value: The name of the material.

name: Measurement
description: Gets the measurement for the dimension.
property_value: For linear dimensions this is a length, for angular dimensions it is an angle.

name: Normal
description: Specifies the three-dimensional normal unit vector for the object.
property_value: A 3D normal unit vector in WCS.

name: ObjectID
description: Gets the object ID.
property_value: The object ID of an object.

name: ObjectName
description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.
property_value: The AutoCAD class name of an object.

name: OwnerID
description: Gets the object ID of the owner (parent) object.
property_value: The object ID of an object's owner.

name: PlotStyleName
description: Specifies the plot style name for an object, group of objects, or layer.
property_value: The plot style name for the object.

name: PrimaryUnitsPrecision
description: Specifies the number of decimal places displayed for the primary units of a dimension or tolerance.
property_value: acDimPrecision enum

name: Rotation
description: Specifies the rotation angle for the object.
property_value: The rotation angle in radians.

name: RoundDistance
description: Specifies the rounding of dimension units.
property_value: A positive real number representing the value to round distances to. The initial value is 0.00.

name: ScaleFactor
description: Specifies the scale factor for the object.
property_value: A real number greater than 0.0. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 shrinks the object.

name: StyleName
description: Specifies the name of the style used with the object.
property_value: The default equals the current style.

name: SubUnitsFactor
description: Specifies the sub-units scale factor for dimension when unit changes to sub-unit.
property_value: The sub-units scale factor.

name: SubUnitsSuffix
description: Specifies the sub-units suffix for dimensions when unit changes to sub-unit.
property_value: The sub-units suffix.

name: SuppressLeadingZeros
description: Specifies the suppression of leading zeros in dimension values.
property_value: Boolean

name: SuppressTrailingZeros
description: Specifies the suppression of trailing zeros in dimension values.
property_value: Boolean

name: SuppressZeroFeet
description: Specifies the suppression of a zero foot measurement in dimension values.
property_value: Boolean

name: SuppressZeroInches
description: Specifies the suppression of a zero inch measurement in dimension values.
property_value: Boolean

name: TextColor
description: Specifies the color of the text for dimension and tolerance objects.
property_value: Use a color index number from 0 to 256, or one of the constants listed here:

name: TextFill
description: Sets fill color on or off.
property_value: Boolean

name: TextFillColor
description: Sets text fill color.
property_value: The text fill color assigned to the object.

name: TextGap
description: Specifies the distance between the dimension text and the dimension line when you break the dimension line to accommodate dimension text.
property_value: A real number specifying the gap distance.

name: TextHeight
description: Specifies the height for the dimension or tolerance text.
property_value: The height for the dimension text.

name: TextInside
description: Specifies if the dimension text is to be drawn inside the extension lines.
property_value: Boolean

name: TextInsideAlign
description: Specifies the position of dimension text inside the extension lines for all dimension types except ordinate.
property_value: Boolean

name: TextMovement
description: Specifies how dimension text is drawn when text is moved.
property_value: acDimTextMovement enum

name: TextOutsideAlign
description: Specifies the position of dimension text outside the extension lines for all dimension types except ordinate.
property_value: Boolean

name: TextOverride
description: Specifies the text string for the dimension.
property_value: The maximum length is 256 characters.

name: TextPosition
description: Specifies the dimension text position.
property_value: A 3D WCS coordinate representing the text position of the dimension.

name: TextPrefix
description: Specifies the dimension value prefix.
property_value: The prefix for the dimension value.

name: TextRotation
description: Specifies the rotation angle of the dimension text.
property_value: The angle in radians of the dimension text. The valid range is 0 to 6.28.

name: TextStyle
description: Specifies the text style for the dimension or tolerance text.
property_value: The style for the dimension value.

name: TextSuffix
description: Specifies the dimension value suffix.
property_value: The suffix for the dimension value.

name: ToleranceDisplay
description: Specifies if tolerances are displayed with the dimension text.
property_value: acDimToleranceMethod enum

name: ToleranceHeightScale
description: Specifies a scale factor for the text height of tolerance values relative to the dimension text height.
property_value: The scale factor for the tolerance values.

name: ToleranceJustification
description: Specifies the vertical justification of tolerance values relative to the nominal dimension text.
property_value: acDimToleranceJustify enum

name: ToleranceLowerLimit
description: Specifies the minimum tolerance limit for dimension text.
property_value: The tolerance lower limit.

name: TolerancePrecision
description: Specifies the precision of tolerance values in primary dimensions.
property_value: acDimPrecision enum

name: ToleranceSuppressLeadingZeros
description: Specifies the suppression of leading zeros in tolerance values.
property_value: Boolean

name: ToleranceSuppressTrailingZeros
description: Specifies the suppression of trailing zeros in dimension values.
property_value: Boolean

name: ToleranceSuppressZeroFeet
description: Specifies the suppression of a zero foot measurement in tolerance values.
property_value: Boolean

name: ToleranceSuppressZeroInches
description: Specifies the suppression of a zero inch measurement in tolerance values.
property_value: Boolean

name: ToleranceUpperLimit
description: Specifies the maximum tolerance limit for dimension text.
property_value: The tolerance lower limit.

name: TrueColor
description: Specifies the True Color of an object.
property_value: The True Color object of the object.

name: UnitsFormat
description: Specifies the unit format for all dimensions except angular.
property_value: acDimLUnits enum

name: VerticalTextPosition
description: Specifies the vertical position of text in relation to the dimension line.
property_value: acDimVerticalJustification enum

name: Visible
description: Specifies the visibility of an object or the application.
property_value: Boolean

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: ClipBoundary
description: Specifies the clipping boundary for a raster image or an underlay.

parameters.description: An array of 2D WCS coordinates specifying the clipping boundary of a raster image or underlay.
parameters.name: PointsArray
parameters.type: Variant (array of two-element array of doubles)

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: Delete
description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetBoundingBox
description: Gets two points of a box enclosing the specified object.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the minimum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MinPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the maximum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MaxPoint

name: GetExtensionDictionary
description: Gets the extension dictionary associated with an object.
return_value: The extension dictionary for the object.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.description: True: The object is highlighted. False: The existing highlight is removed from the object.
parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Mirror
description: Creates a mirror-image copy of a planar object around an axis.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point2

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Mirror3D
description: Creates a mirror image of the given object about a plane.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the third point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point3

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Move
description: Moves an object along a vector.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point2

name: Rotate
description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the point through which the axis of rotation is defined as parallel to the Z axis of the UCS.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object. This angle determines how far an object rotates around the base point relative to its current location.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates an object around a 3D axis. Point1 and Point2 define the line that becomes the axis of rotation.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The factor by which to scale the object. The dimensions of the object are multiplied by the scale factor. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 reduces the object. The scale factor must be greater than 0.0.
parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetXData
description: Sets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: TransformBy
description: Moves, scales, or rotates an object given a 4x4 transformation matrix.

parameters.description: A 4x4 matrix specifying the transformation to perform.
parameters.name: TransformationMatrix

name: Update
description: Updates the object to the drawing screen.

description: Determines whether the underlay colors are adjusted for the current background color.

property_value: The Application object that is the owner of the object.

description: Specifies the current contrast value of an image or underlay.

description: Gets the document (drawing) in which the object belongs.

name: Fade
description: Specifies the current fade value of a raster or underlay image.

name: File

property_value: The path to the underlay file.

property_value: The Hyperlinks collection for the entity.

description: Specifies the item of the underlay file.
property_value: The item of the underlay file.

description: Specifies the linetype of an object.

description: Specifies the linetype scale of an object.

description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.
property_value: The AutoCAD class name of an object.

name: Offset
description: Creates a new object at a specified offset distance from an existing object.

parameters.description: The distance to offset the object. The offset can be a positive or negative number, but it cannot equal zero. If the offset is negative, this is interpreted as being an offset to make a "smaller" curve (that is, for an arc it would offset to a radius that is "Distance less" than the starting curve's radius). If "smaller" has no meaning, then it would offset in the direction of smaller X, Y, and Z WCS coordinates.
parameters.name: Distance

return_value: An array of the newly created objects resulting from the offset.

name: Offset
description: Creates a new object at a specified offset distance from an existing object.

parameters.description: The distance to offset the object. The offset can be a positive or negative number, but it cannot equal zero. If the offset is negative, this is interpreted as being an offset to make a "smaller" curve (that is, for an arc it would offset to a radius that is "Distance less" than the starting curve's radius). If "smaller" has no meaning, then it would offset in the direction of smaller X, Y, and Z WCS coordinates.
parameters.name: Distance

return_value: An array of the newly created objects resulting from the offset.

description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates an object around a 3D axis. Point1 and Point2 define the line that becomes the axis of rotation.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.

description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.name: BasePoint
