property_value: The Hyperlinks collection for the entity.

name: Layer
description: Specifies the layer for an object.
property_value: The name of the layer.

name: Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of an object.
property_value: The linetype of an object. The default linetype is the linetype of the layer (ByLayer).

name: LinetypeScale
description: Specifies the linetype scale of an object.
property_value: This value must be a positive real number. The default is 1.0.

name: Lineweight
description: Specifies the lineweight of an individual object or the default lineweight for the drawing.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: MaintainAssociativity
description: Specifies if a surface maintains its associativity with another surface.
property_value: Long

name: Material
description: Specifies the name of the material.
property_value: The name of the material.

name: NumCrossSections
description: Gets the number of cross-section curves used.
property_value: The number of cross-section curves used for the lofted surface.

name: NumGuidePaths
description: Gets the number of guide paths used.
property_value: The number of guide paths used for the lofted surface.

name: ObjectID
description: Gets the object ID.
property_value: The object ID of an object.

name: ObjectName
description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.
property_value: The AutoCAD class name of an object.

name: OwnerID
description: Gets the object ID of the owner (parent) object.
property_value: The object ID of an object's owner.

name: Periodic
description: Specifies that a smooth and closed surface is created without a kink if it is reshaped.
property_value: Boolean

name: PlotStyleName
description: Specifies the plot style name for an object, group of objects, or layer.
property_value: The plot style name for the object.

name: ShowAssociativity
description: Specifies if dependent surfaces are highlighted when the surface is selected.
property_value: Boolean

name: StartDraftAngle
description: Specifies the draft angle of the surface for the first cross section.
property_value: The draft angle of the first cross section.

name: StartDraftMagnitude
description: Specifies the draft magnitude of the surface for the first cross section.
property_value: The draft magnitude of the first cross section.

name: StartSmoothContinuity
description: Specifies the tangency and curvature of the first cross section.
property_value: The tangency and curvature of the first cross section.

name: StartSmoothMagnitude
description: Specifies the size of the curve of the first cross section.
property_value: The size of the curve of the first cross section.

name: SurfaceNormals
description: Specifies for which cross-section curves the surface is normal to the cross section.
property_value: The cross-section curves that are normal to the surface.

name: SurfaceType
description: Indicates the type of surface.
property_value: String

name: SurfTrimAssociativity
description: Specifies if associativity is maintained between the surface and the objects used to trim the object.
property_value: Variant

name: TrueColor
description: Specifies the True Color of an object.
property_value: The True Color object of the object.

name: UIsolineDensity
description: Specifies the number of U isolines that are displayed.
property_value: Number of isolines that the object displays in the U direction.

name: Visible
description: Specifies the visibility of an object or the application.
property_value: Boolean

name: VIsolineDensity
description: Specifies the number of V isolines that are displayed.
property_value: Number of isolines that the object displays in the V direction.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

description: Converts a dynamic block to a regular named block.

parameters.description: The name for the block.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror axis.
parameters.name: Point2

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Mirror3D
description: Creates a mirror image of the given object about a plane.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the third point of the mirror plane.
parameters.name: Point3

return_value: This object can be one of any drawing object and is the result of mirroring the original object.

name: Move
description: Moves an object along a vector.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the move vector.
parameters.name: Point2

name: Rotate
description: Rotates an object around a base point.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the point through which the axis of rotation is defined as parallel to the Z axis of the UCS.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object. This angle determines how far an object rotates around the base point relative to its current location.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: Rotate3D
description: Rotates an object around a 3D axis. Point1 and Point2 define the line that becomes the axis of rotation.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the first point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point1

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the second point of the axis line.
parameters.name: Point2

parameters.description: The angle in radians to rotate the object about the selected axis.
parameters.name: RotationAngle

name: ScaleEntity
description: Scales an object equally in the X, Y, and Z directions.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the base point.
parameters.name: BasePoint

parameters.description: The factor by which to scale the object. The dimensions of the object are multiplied by the scale factor. A scale factor greater than 1 enlarges the object. A scale factor between 0 and 1 reduces the object. The scale factor must be greater than 0.0.
parameters.name: ScaleFactor

name: SetXData
description: Sets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: TransformBy
description: Moves, scales, or rotates an object given a 4x4 transformation matrix.

parameters.description: A 4x4 matrix specifying the transformation to perform.
parameters.name: TransformationMatrix

name: Update
description: Updates the object to the drawing screen.

name: Application
description: Gets the Application object.
property_value: The Application object that is the owner of the object.

name: ColorScheme
description: Specifies the color scheme to display point cloud.
property_value: The name of the color scheme to use for the point cloud.

name: Document
description: Gets the document (drawing) in which the object belongs.
property_value: The document (drawing) that contains the object.

name: EntityTransparency
description: Specifies the transparency value for the entity.
property_value: Use one of the following values:

name: Geolocate
description: Specifies whether the point cloud is geographically located.
property_value: Boolean

name: Handle
description: Gets the handle of an object.
property_value: The handle of the entity.

name: HasExtensionDictionary
description: Determines whether the object has an extension dictionary associated with it.
property_value: Boolean

name: Hyperlinks
description: Gets the Hyperlinks collection for an entity.
property_value: The Hyperlinks collection for the entity.

name: InsertionPoint
description: Insertion point for a tolerance, text, block, or shape, and the origin (upper-left corner) of an OLE object.
property_value: A 3D WCS coordinate representing the insertion or origin point.

name: Layer
description: Specifies the layer for an object.
property_value: The name of the layer.

name: Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of an object.
property_value: The linetype of an object. The default linetype is the linetype of the layer (ByLayer).

name: LinetypeScale
description: Specifies the linetype scale of an object.
property_value: This value must be a positive real number. The default is 1.0.

name: Lineweight
description: Specifies the lineweight of an individual object or the default lineweight for the drawing.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: Locked
description: Specifies if the point cloud is locked.
property_value: Boolean

name: Material
description: Specifies the name of the material.
property_value: The name of the material.

name: Name
description: Specifies the name of the object.
property_value: Name of the object.

name: ObjectID
description: Gets the object ID.
property_value: The object ID of an object.

name: ObjectName
description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.
property_value: The AutoCAD class name of an object.

name: OwnerID
description: Gets the object ID of the owner (parent) object.
property_value: The object ID of an object's owner.

name: Path
description: Gets the path of the block, document, application, or external reference.
property_value: The path of the application, document, or reference.

name: PlotStyleName
description: Specifies the plot style name for an object, group of objects, or layer.
property_value: The plot style name for the object.

name: Rotation
description: Specifies the rotation angle for the object.
property_value: The rotation angle in radians.

name: Scale
description: Specifies the scale factor from start to the end of the sweep path.
property_value: The scale factor applied to the object or swept path.

name: Segmentation
description: Returns the segmentation data status of the point cloud.
property_value: String

name: ShowCropped
description: Specifies if the point cloud is shown cropped.
property_value: Boolean

name: Stylization
description: Specifies color stylization for selected point cloud.
property_value: AcPointCloudExStylizationType enum

name: TrueColor
description: Specifies the True Color of an object.
property_value: The True Color object of the object.

name: Unit
description: Gets the unit of the point cloud file.
property_value: A string representing the unit of the point cloud file.

name: UnitFactor
description: Gets the insertion unit factor of the point cloud file.
property_value: The insertion unit factor for the point cloud.

name: Visible
description: Specifies the visibility of an object or the application.
property_value: Boolean

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Copy
description: Duplicates the given object to the same location.

name: Delete
description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetBoundingBox
description: Gets two points of a box enclosing the specified object.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the minimum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MinPoint

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the maximum point of the object's bounding box.
parameters.name: MaxPoint

name: GetExtensionDictionary
description: Gets the extension dictionary associated with an object.
return_value: The extension dictionary for the object.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Highlight
description: Sets the highlight status for the given object, or for all objects in a given selection set.

parameters.description: True: The object is highlighted. False: The existing highlight is removed from the object.
parameters.name: HighlightFlag

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

name: Offset
description: Creates a new object at a specified offset distance from an existing object.

parameters.description: The distance to offset the object. The offset can be a positive or negative number, but it cannot equal zero. If the offset is negative, this is interpreted as being an offset to make a "smaller" curve (that is, for an arc it would offset to a radius that is "Distance less" than the starting curve's radius). If "smaller" has no meaning, then it would offset in the direction of smaller X, Y, and Z WCS coordinates.
parameters.name: Distance

return_value: An array of the newly created objects resulting from the offset.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Offset
description: Creates a new object at a specified offset distance from an existing object.

parameters.description: The distance to offset the object. The offset can be a positive or negative number, but it cannot equal zero. If the offset is negative, this is interpreted as being an offset to make a "smaller" curve (that is, for an arc it would offset to a radius that is "Distance less" than the starting curve's radius). If "smaller" has no meaning, then it would offset in the direction of smaller X, Y, and Z WCS coordinates.

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.

name: Application
description: Gets the Application object.
property_value: The Application object that is the owner of the object.

name: BreaksEnabled
description: Specifies if table breaks are enabled.
property_value: Determines whether table breaking is in use. When enabled, the table will break automatically at the current specified height.

name: BreakSpacing
description: Specifies the break spacing for a table.
property_value: Controls the spacing between the broken table parts. Depending on the break direction this will be a horizontal or vertical spacing.

name: Columns
description: Specifies the number of columns in a block array or table.
property_value: The number of columns in the block array or table.

name: ColumnWidth
description: Specifies the uniform width of all columns in the table.
property_value: Uniform width of all columns.

name: Direction
description: Specifies the viewing direction for a 3D visualization of the drawing, or the direction vector of the table.
property_value: All other objects: The vector is a three-element array of doubles that defines a direction from which the drawing can be viewed.

name: Document
description: Gets the document (drawing) in which the object belongs.
property_value: The document (drawing) that contains the object.

name: EnableBreak
description: Toggles table breaking.
property_value: Boolean

name: EntityTransparency
description: Specifies the transparency value for the entity.
property_value: Use one of the following values:

name: FlowDirection
description: Specifies whether the title and header rows are at the bottom or the top of the table.
property_value: Specify one of the following constants for the location of the title and header rows.

name: Handle
description: Gets the handle of an object.
property_value: The handle of the entity.

name: HasExtensionDictionary
description: Determines whether the object has an extension dictionary associated with it.
property_value: Boolean

name: HasSubSelection
description: Specifies whether the table contains a subselection set.
property_value: Boolean

name: HeaderSuppressed
description: Specifies whether the header of the table is suppressed.
property_value: Boolean

name: Height
description: Changes the height of the object.
property_value: This must be a positive, non-negative number.

name: HorzCellMargin
description: Specifies the value of the horizontal margin of cells.
property_value: The horizontal margin applied to each table cell.

name: Hyperlinks
description: Gets the Hyperlinks collection for an entity.
property_value: The Hyperlinks collection for the entity.

name: InsertionPoint
description: Insertion point for a tolerance, text, block, or shape, and the origin (upper-left corner) of an OLE object.
property_value: A 3D WCS coordinate representing the insertion or origin point.

name: Layer
description: Specifies the layer for an object.
property_value: The name of the layer.

name: Linetype
description: Specifies the linetype of an object.
property_value: The linetype of an object. The default linetype is the linetype of the layer (ByLayer).

name: LinetypeScale
description: Specifies the linetype scale of an object.
property_value: This value must be a positive real number. The default is 1.0.

name: Lineweight
description: Specifies the lineweight of an individual object or the default lineweight for the drawing.
property_value: acLineWeight enum

name: Material
description: Specifies the name of the material.
property_value: The name of the material.

name: MinimumTableHeight
description: Specifies the minimum height of the table.
property_value: The minimum height of the table.

name: MinimumTableWidth
description: Specifies the minimum width of the table.
property_value: The minimum width of the table.

name: ObjectID
description: Gets the object ID.
property_value: The object ID of an object.

name: ObjectName
description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.
property_value: The AutoCAD class name of an object.

name: OwnerID
description: Gets the object ID of the owner (parent) object.
property_value: The object ID of an object's owner.

name: PlotStyleName
description: Specifies the plot style name for an object, group of objects, or layer.
property_value: The plot style name for the object.

name: RegenerateTableSuppressed
description: Enables or disables regeneration of the table block.
property_value: Boolean

name: RepeatBottomLabels
description: Determines whether the bottom set of label rows is repeated at the bottom of each broken table part.
property_value: Flag indicating how bottom labels ought to display.

name: RepeatTopLabels
description: Determines whether the first set of label rows will be repeated at the top of each broken table part.
property_value: Flag indicating how top labels ought to display.

name: RowHeight
description: Specifies a uniform height for all rows in the table.
property_value: The uniform height for all rows in the table.

name: Rows
description: Specifies the number of rows in a block array or table.
property_value: The number of rows in the block array or table.

name: StyleName
description: Specifies the name of the style used with the object.
property_value: The default equals the current style.

name: TableBreakFlowDirection
description: Determines the direction that parts of the table flow.
property_value: AcTableFlowDirection enum

name: TableBreakHeight
description: Sets the breaking height for the initial table part and any other table parts that do not have manual heights set.
property_value: Value for the break height.

name: TableStyleOverrides
description: Specifies the table style overrides.
property_value: Variant; acTableStyleOverrides enum

name: TitleSuppressed
description: Specifies whether the title of the table is suppressed.
property_value: Boolean

name: TrueColor
description: Specifies the True Color of an object.
property_value: The True Color object of the object.

name: VertCellMargin

name: ArrayPolar
description: Creates a polar array of objects given a NumberOfObjects, AngleToFill, and CenterPoint.

parameters.description: The number of objects to be created in the polar array. This must be a positive integer greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfObjects

parameters.description: The angle to fill in radians. A positive value specifies counterclockwise rotation. A negative value specifies clockwise rotation. An error is returned for an angle that equals 0.
parameters.name: AngleToFill

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the center point for the polar array.
parameters.name: CenterPoint

name: ArrayRectangular
description: Creates a 2D or 3D rectangular array of objects.

parameters.description: The number of rows in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfColumns must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfRows

parameters.description: The number of columns in the rectangular array. This must be a positive number. If this number is 1, then NumberOfRows must be greater than 1.
parameters.name: NumberOfColumns

parameters.description: The number of levels in a 3D array.
parameters.name: NumberOfLevels

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.
parameters.name: DistBetweenRows

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.
parameters.name: DistBetweenLevels

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

description: Deletes a specified object or a set of saved layer settings.

name: GetXData
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.

name: IntersectWith
description: Gets the points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The object can be one of the supported drawing objects or an AttributeReference.
parameters.name: IntersectObject

parameters.description: This option specifies if none, one or both, of the objects are to be extended in order to attempt an intersection. acExtendNone: Does not extend either object. acExtendThisEntity: Extends the base object. acExtendOtherEntity: Extends the object passed as an argument. acExtendBoth: Extends both objects.
parameters.name: ExtendOption

return_value: The array of points where one object intersects another object in the drawing.

parameters.description: The distance between the rows. If the distance between rows is a positive number, rows are added upward from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, rows are added downward.

parameters.description: The distance between the columns. If the distance between columns is a positive number, columns are added to the right of the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, columns are added to the left.
parameters.name: DistBetweenColumns

parameters.description: The distance between the array levels. If the distance between levels is a positive number, levels are added in the positive direction from the base entity. If the distance is a negative number, levels are added in the negative direction.

return_value: The array of newly created objects.

name: Offset
description: Creates a new object at a specified offset distance from an existing object.

parameters.description: The distance to offset the object. The offset can be a positive or negative number, but it cannot equal zero. If the offset is negative, this is interpreted as being an offset to make a "smaller" curve (that is, for an arc it would offset to a radius that is "Distance less" than the starting curve's radius). If "smaller" has no meaning, then it would offset in the direction of smaller X, Y, and Z WCS coordinates.
parameters.name: Distance

return_value: An array of the newly created objects resulting from the offset.

description: Runs a VBA macro from the Application object.

parameters.description: A string representing the calling sequence of the macro to run. The calling sequence must have the following syntax, where [] represent optional parameters: [Filename.dvb.][ProjectName.][ModuleName.]MacroName Note: If Filename.dvb is followed by ProjectName, separate the names with an exclamation point instead of a period, as in the following example: Filename.dvb!ProjectName The Filename.dvb specified will be loaded if it is not already loaded. If the path to the Filename.dvb is not specified, the AutoCAD search path is searched to locate the file. If ProjectName is not specified, all currently loaded projects are searched to locate the macro.
parameters.name: MacroPath

name: AddAttribute
description: Creates an attribute definition at the given location with the specified properties.

parameters.description: Any combination of constants can be used by adding them together: acAttributeModeInvisible: Specifies that attribute values will not appear when you insert the block. The AutoCAD ATTDISP command overrides the Invisible mode. acAttributeModeConstant: Gives attributes a fixed value for block insertions. acAttributeModeVerify: Prompts to verify the attribute value is correct when the block is inserted. acAttributeModeLockPosition: Locks the position of the attributes. acAttributeModeMultipleLine: Allows the attributes to carry-over onto multiple lines. Prompts you to verify that the attribute value is correct when you insert the block. acAttributeModePreset: Sets the attribute to its default value when you insert a block containing a current attribute. The value cannot be edited in this mode.
parameters.name: Mode

parameters.description: This string appears when a block containing this attribute is inserted. The default for this string is the Tag string. Inputting acAttributeModeConstant for the Mode parameter disables the prompt.
parameters.name: Prompt

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the location for the attribute.

parameters.description: This non-null string identifies each occurrence of the attribute. Enter any characters except spaces or exclamation points. AutoCAD changes lowercase letters to uppercase.

parameters.description: This non-null string is the default attribute value.
parameters.name: Value

Note: While the argument accepts an integer, it is recommended to use True and False. True creates an ordinate dimension that displays the X axis value and False displays the Y axis value.

parameters.name: MajorAxis

parameters.description: A positive value defining the major to minor axis ratio of an ellipse. A radius ratio of 1.0 defines a circle. Radius ratio = 0.25 Radius ratio = 0.75
parameters.name: RadiusRatio

parameters.description: The length of the major radius for the ellipse base. Must be a positive number.

parameters.description: The length of the minor radius for the ellipse base. Must be a positive number.

parameters.description: The height of the cone. Must be a positive number.
parameters.name: Height

parameters.description: The length of the major radius for the ellipse base. Must be a positive number.

parameters.description: The length of the minor radius for the ellipse base. Must be a positive number.

name: AddExtrudedSolid
description: Creates an extruded solid given the profile, height, and taper angle.

parameters.description: A profile can only be a Region object.
parameters.name: Profile

parameters.description: The height of the extrusion along the Z axis of the object's coordinate system. If you enter a positive number, AutoCAD extrudes the object along the positive Z axis. If you enter a negative number, AutoCAD extrudes the object along the negative Z axis.
parameters.name: Height

parameters.description: The taper angle of the extrusion must be provided in radians. The range of the taper angle is from -90 to +90 degrees. Positive angles taper in from the base, negative angles taper out. The default angle, 0, extrudes a 2D object perpendicular to its plane.
parameters.name: TaperAngle

return_value: A 3DSolid object as the newly created extruded solid.

name: AddExtrudedSolidALongPath
description: Creates an extruded solid given the profile and an extrusion path.

parameters.description: A profile can only be a Region object.
parameters.name: Profile

parameters.description: The path can only be a Polyline, Circle, Ellipse, Spline, or Arc object.
parameters.name: Path

name: AddHatch
description: Creates a Hatch object.

parameters.description: If the HatchObjectType parameter value is acHatchObject, then use the AcPatternType enum; if the HatchObjectType parameter value is AcGradientObject, then use the AcGradientPatternType enum. AcPatternType enum acHatchPatternTypePredefined: Selects the pattern name from those defined in the acad.pat file. acHatchPatternTypeUserDefined: Defines a pattern of lines using the current linetype. acHatchPatternTypeCustomDefined: Selects the pattern name from a PAT file other than the acad.pat file. AcGradientPatternType enum acPreDefinedGradient: Selects the fill name from one of the standard values. acUserDefinedGradient: Defines a pattern based on property values.
parameters.name: PatternType

parameters.description: If the HatchObjectType parameter value is acHatchObject, then PatternName should contain the hatch pattern name. If the HatchObjectType parameter value is acGradientObject, then PatternName should contain one of the gradient pattern names listed in GradientName.
parameters.name: PatternName

parameters.description: True: The hatch will be associative. False: The hatch will not be associative.
parameters.name: Associativity

parameters.description: The default value is the AcHatchObjectType enum value of AcHatchObject. If the AcHatchObjectType enum value is AcGradientObject, then PatternType should be of type AcGradientPatternType, and PatternName should contain the gradient pattern name.
parameters.name: HatchObjectType

name: GetXdata
description: Gets the extended data (XData) associated with an object.

parameters.description: A NULL string will return all the data attached to the object, regardless of the application that created it. Supplying an application name will return only the data that was created by the specified application.
parameters.name: AppName

parameters.description: An array of short integer values that represent the DXF group code values for each value in the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataType

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: InsertBlock
description: Inserts a drawing file or a named block that has been defined in the current drawing.

parameters.description: The 3D WCS coordinates specifying the location in the drawing to insert the block.
parameters.name: InsertionPoint

parameters.description: The name of the AutoCAD drawing file or the name of the block to insert. If it is a file name, include the .dwg extension and any path information necessary for AutoCAD to find the file.
parameters.name: Name

parameters.description: The default equals 1.0. Must be a positive number.
parameters.name: Xscale

parameters.description: The default equals 1.0. Must be a positive number.
parameters.name: Yscale

parameters.description: The default equals 1.0. Must be a positive number.
parameters.name: Zscale

parameters.description: The default equals 0.0 radians.

parameters.description: The password that was applied to the drawing file when it was saved.

return_value: The placed block as a Block Reference object.

parameters.name: Index

return_value: The object at the given index location in the collection or selection set.

name: SetXdata

parameters.description: An array of values that make up the extended data (XData).
parameters.name: XDataValue

name: Application
description: Gets the Application object.
property_value: The Application object that is the owner of the object.

name: Count

property_value: The number of items in the object.

name: Document

property_value: The document (drawing) that contains the object.

name: Handle

description: Determines whether the object has an extension dictionary associated with it.

name: Layout

name: Name
description: Specifies the name of the object.
property_value: Name of the object.

name: ObjectID
description: Gets the object ID.

name: ObjectName
description: Gets the AutoCAD class name of the object.

name: Origin

property_value: 3D Point: A 3D WCS coordinate specifying the origin of the object.

property_value: The object ID of an object's owner.

name: Units
